name: prompt-cache-discount-expiry
title: Codex Responses prompt cache discount expiry billing
description: Gateway-side fixed 180s cache-read discount expiry for Codex /v1/responses traffic: the cycle owner's cached tokens are rebilled as full-price input, with billing, consume logs, and client-visible usage adjusted from one decision.
creator: yls
notes: 2026-07-10 merged earlier planning iteration 07-11-upstream-usage-cache-expiry-billing into this task; its archived artifacts remain research-only and current prd.md/design.md win conflicts. 2026-07-11 realigned to positively identified Codex /v1/responses traffic and a fixed 180s cycle. User selected prompt_cache_key with Session_id fallback as the same-request cache-lineage identity, always-on activation with no feature flag, and no-Redis compatibility no-op startup. Implementation and acceptance verification completed with containerized Go 1.25.1; full tests/build/race pass, while full vet retains documented pre-existing warnings.
